Document:
# Morph
[color=#999999][italic]A scene of morphs eating a delicious clown[/italic][/color]
Morphs are interdimensional terrors from the netherworld, traveling to your station during mating season to eat organics and items to produce [color=#79b037]biomass[/color] - Morphs gain biomass by eating food or other creatures such as mice, monkeys, and crew. - Morphs can use biomass to divide, creating a copy of themselves - Morphs can eat anything, allowing you to eat valuable gear and weapons if you get the chance - Morphs can disguise as items or crew to trick prey into letting their guard down - Morphs take 50% more [color=#e6a009]heat[/color] damage. - Morphs are completely immune to [color=green]radiation[/color] damage.
